Emilia "Satella, Lia, Emily, Witch of Frost, Half-Devil, Witch's Daughter"

Emilia (エミリア)

Birthday: September 23
Height: 164 cm (5'4.5")

The main female protagonist. She is a silver-haired half-elf girl who is one of the candidates to become the next ruler in the royal election.

Emilia is good natured and likes to take care of others, though she herself refuses to admit it.
Voice Actors
 Takahashi, Rie
Japanese
Mills, Kayli
English
